title: July 30th, 2021 (2)
body:
- professional
    - i will not get rich lyrics
        - i will not get rich
        - adding friction to scrap off profits
        - i'm here to pitch in
        - not just pop in and pitch up the progress of your mission
        - my object is skin flesh and bones
        - my subject is hymn nodes and tones
    - i was born in a bottomless pit lyrics
        - i was born in a bottomless pit
        - just like you but you forgot about it
        - and that's not a bad way to see life is full of shit
        - but still go about it
        - locked in like there's something you gotta get
        - call it a credo
        - but it's just shorts under a speedo
        - cuz you were uncomfortable
        - swimming in the nude
        - i don't mean to be rude
        - but i see those clothes
        - and i know they're not you
        - even though i don't know what's underneath em
        - under these i'm very fuzzy
        - p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]s tease ap[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] wherever you reach to touch me
        - so i magpie trash i think is lovely
        - and watch your face feedback while you learn to love me
        - so i can eat it and return the energy
        - whenever i heat up, a storm births into me
        - cool waters drum roofs, my thunder's a symphony
        - it's all woodwinds and timpani
        - cuz when i wanna solo strings i prefer picking me
        - as i've gotten older
        - sometimes i'm still
        - the calm in the eye of the beholder
        - the ground that appears when you cry on the offered shoulder
        - when you die
        - i hope you see
        - the whole universe will hold you
        - or else it would stop being itself
        - the contract it signed when it souled you
        - your self a soldier in a war that's never over
        - krishna told ya so you could live it sober
        - crashing into each other
        - cuz we're impaired from the moment we enter vehi
        - cle cuz they all got spots you can't see shit
        - and yet we drive like our lives depend on it
        - either that or life is drive but there's limits on all ends it
        - so there's no benefit not gettin so into it
        - that you perfect the window tint
        - sound system, perfect scented
        - trees to keep you centered
